business.name: Stepule's Sanitation Service, Inc.
business.tagline: When your septic system fails, we don't

hero.headline: Hartford's *septic emergency* hotline
hero.subheadline: Saturday morning backup? Thanksgiving crisis? We answer the phone and show up the same day.

services_section.label: WHAT WE HANDLE
services_section.heading: Septic problems don't wait for business hours
services_section.subheading: Emergency repairs, routine pumping, and everything in between

services.title: Emergency Septic Repair
services.description: Overflowing tanks, broken pumps, and weekend disasters. We respond fast when things go wrong.

services.title: Septic Tank Pumping
services.description: Regular maintenance pumping to keep your system running smoothly. Schedule ahead or call when needed.

services.title: Septic Inspections
services.description: Pre-purchase inspections and system evaluations. We'll tell you exactly what you're dealing with.

services.title: System Troubleshooting
services.description: Strange smells, slow drains, wet spots in the yard. We diagnose the problem and explain your options.

about.heading: Real people answering the phone
about.body: We're Hartford's go-to septic team when things go sideways. Brenda and Drew handle the calls, and our techs show up ready to work.

reviews.name: Alexis V.
reviews.text: Septic issues tried to ruin my Thanksgiving week. Called Brenda and Drew on Saturday morning and they came out that same day. Drew was great — positive attitude and answered all my questions.

reviews.name: Justin G.
reviews.text: Very stressful situation with an overflowing tank and broken pump. Stepule's was fantastic — responsive, professional, and calm when we needed it most. They clearly knew what they were doing.

reviews.name: Lauren S.
reviews.text: Brenda came out to check a potential issue in our new home. She was incredibly knowledgeable and helpful. They didn't even charge for the house call. Amazing folks!

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Hartford and surrounding communities
service_areas.subheading: Emergency septic service throughout central Connecticut

cta.heading: Septic emergency? Don't panic.
cta.body: Call us right now. We'll walk you through what's happening and get someone out there as soon as possible.
